mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pay (activityID, userID, payAmount, payStatus, payMethod, payTime, payRemark, paymentProofPath) VALUES (#{activityID}, #{userID}, #{payAmount}, #{payStatus}, #{payMethod}, #{payTime}, #{payRemark}, #{paymentProofPath})
mapper.update: UPDATE pay SET payStatus = #{payStatus}, payMethod = #{payMethod}, payTime = #{payTime}, payRemark = #{payRemark}, paymentProofPath = #{paymentProofPath} WHERE payID = #{payID}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pay WHERE activityID = #{activityID} AND userID = #{userID} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM pay WHERE activityID = #{activityID} ORDER BY payID DESC
SELECT * FROM pay WHERE userID = #{userID} ORDER BY payID DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(payAmount), 0) FROM pay WHERE userID = #{userID} AND payStatus = '已支付'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.payAmount), 0) FROM pay p INNER JOIN groupactivity ga ON p.activityID = ga.activityID WHERE ga.creatorID = #{creatorID} AND p.payStatus = '已支付'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(payAmount), 0) FROM pay WHERE activityID = #{activityID} AND payStatus = '已支付'
